message:
test(conformance): add event-loop contract adversarial test suite

Introduce packet classification routing and deterministic fixture coverage
for event-loop contract validation. Includes reason code validation for fd
registration, accept path, read buffer, and write delivery violations with
adversarial corpus expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,15 @@
   "corpus_id": "frankenredis-foundation-adversarial-v1",
   "default_seed": 424242,
   "suites": [
+    {
+      "suite_id": "adv_fr_p2c_001_eventloop_v1",
+      "mode": "command",
+      "fixture": "fr_p2c_001_eventloop_journey.json",
+      "risk_focus": "event_loop_contract",
+      "owner_bead": "bd-2wb.12.6",
+      "strict_replay_cmd": "FR_MODE=strict FR_SEED=17 rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-runtime -- --nocapture fr_p2c_001_unit_contract_smoke",
+      "hardened_replay_cmd": "FR_MODE=hardened FR_SEED=42 rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture fr_p2c_001_e2e_contract_smoke"
+    },
     {
       "suite_id": "adv_protocol_negative_v1",
       "mode": "protocol",

@@ -80,9 +80,9 @@ chmod +x "$REPLAY_SCRIPT"
 echo "Verifying live Redis endpoint ${HOST}:${PORT}"
 redis-cli -h "$HOST" -p "$PORT" ping >/dev/null
 
-declare -a SUITE_NAMES=("core_errors" "core_strings" "protocol_negative")
-declare -a SUITE_MODES=("command" "command" "protocol")
-declare -a SUITE_FIXTURES=("core_errors.json" "core_strings.json" "protocol_negative.json")
+declare -a SUITE_NAMES=("core_errors" "core_strings" "fr_p2c_001_eventloop_journey" "protocol_negative")
+declare -a SUITE_MODES=("command" "command" "command" "protocol")
+declare -a SUITE_FIXTURES=("core_errors.json" "core_strings.json" "fr_p2c_001_eventloop_journey.json" "protocol_negative.json")
 
 FAILED_COUNT=0
 TOTAL_COUNT=0
@@ -185,6 +185,8 @@ artifact_index = collections.defaultdict(list)
 
 
 def packet_id_for_fixture(fixture_name: str) -> str:
+    if fixture_name == "fr_p2c_001_eventloop_journey.json":
+        return "FR-P2C-001"
     if fixture_name == "protocol_negative.json":
         return "FR-P2C-002"
     if fixture_name == "persist_replay.json":
